completionPosture: The strategy plan authorizes the visual proof materializer artifact cluster while leaving behavior truth to resolver-mediated SOG execution and promotion evidence.
forbiddenClaims: strategy plan is durable product truth
provider candidate grants authority by itself
ASCII/HTML materialization is proven without SOG receipts
generated proof surface can bypass SOG promotion

acceptedClaims: strategy authority may authorize artifact projection
strategy authority does not create durable product truth
visual proof materializer behavior remains owned by SOG execution and receipts
every projected output must be listed in the artifact manifest

promotionBar: provider evidence exists before candidate hardening
strategy plan is promoted only after guardrails pass
artifact manifest bounds every generated JSON and output path
strategy authority does not claim durable behavior
SOG/materialization proof remains separate from strategy authority

sourceStory.text: As a conveyor designer, I need a visual proof materializer in my semantic operation graph, so that my conveyor can generate visual proofs and materialize them as ASCII and HTML evidence.

strategyIntent: Authorize the visual proof materializer artifact cluster so one promoted visual model can project reviewable ASCII and HTML evidence through resolver-mediated JSON execution.

traceQuestions.whichSogOwnsBehavior: contracts/semantic-operation-graphs/projections/visual-proof-materialize.sog.v1.json for materialization proof; durable behavior still requires SOG promotion evidence.
traceQuestions.whichStoryRequiredThis: The operator CLI story for a visual proof materializer strategy.
